svg.title: Louise's Florist logo
svg.desc: An original 1930s-style cartoon lady with a curly black bob holding a bunch of pink roses, inside a pink and teal circular badge, next to the wordmark Louise's Florist.

text.style: fill:rgb(194, 74, 99);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Serif Variable", "Anthropic Serif", ui-serif, Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;font-size:34px;font-weight:500;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto

fill:rgb(122, 139, 137);stroke:none;color:rgb(11, 11, 11);stroke-width:1px;stroke-linecap:butt;stroke-linejoin:miter;opacity:1;font-family:"Anthropic Serif Variable", "Anthropic Serif", ui-serif, Georgia, "Times New Roman", serif;font-size:15px;font-weight:400;text-anchor:start;dominant-baseline:auto
